message.content: Search for the notification template string definitions for "document_permission_request", "permission_approved", "permission_rejected", "permission_apply_submitted" in the codebase at D:/collabspace/apitable. These might be in frontend source files (tsx, ts, js), JSON config files, or any resource files. Look in packages/datasheet, packages/i18n-lang, or anywhere else. Find the actual display string templates like "XXX申请获取YYY文档的权限" or similar. Use Grep with these template IDs.
